message:
chore(gitignore): ignore scratch oracle-diff binaries and golden .actual outputs

Two groups of ephemeral files that had been showing up as untracked:

Root-level scratch oracle binaries and their source files
- `/print_diffs`, `/print_diffs.rs`, `/run_oracle_diff`,
  `/run_oracle_diff.rs` — one-off Rust scripts (and the compiled
  ~4 MB binaries they produce) used by agents to diff our
  responses against a live Redis oracle. They are not part of the
  workspace and should stay local.

Golden-test `.actual` outputs
- `**/tests/golden/*.actual` — when a golden test fails, the harness
  writes the actual observed output next to the expected `.golden`
  file so the diff is easy to inspect. These are regenerated on
  every failing run and must never be committed as goldens.

Both patterns are added after the existing `/check_result_*` rule
so the ordering reads as "extensionless scratch → scratch binaries →
golden-diff outputs".

files.patch:
@@ -157,6 +157,15 @@ ubs_*.jsonl
 # Extensionless scratch output files
 /check_result_*
 
+# Root-level scratch diff/oracle binaries + their source files
+/print_diffs
+/print_diffs.rs
+/run_oracle_diff
+/run_oracle_diff.rs
+
+# Golden-test `.actual` outputs (diff output of failing golden comparisons)
+**/tests/golden/*.actual
+
 # Empty test stubs (agent-generated, never completed)
 crates/fr-server/tests/replica_of_replica.rs
 crates/fr-server/tests/test_replica_of_replica.rs
